programs.title: NITV On the Road: Mbantua
programs.desc: A weekend of culture and music in Central Australia.

programs.title: Bamay
programs.desc: Jinibarra man BJ Murphy talks about his Country, including the Obi Obi River, and the problems it is facing.

programs.title: Bamay
programs.desc: Jinibarra man BJ Murphy talks about his Country, including the Obi Obi River, and the problems it is facing.

programs.title: Toi Time
programs.desc: The Toi Time whanau are excited about going on holiday. Maia makes a caravan to take with them and Aunty Anika sings about her Nana's farm.

programs.title: Waabiny Time
programs.desc: In Noongar Boodgar, Noongar Country there's so much to see. Wano, this way the djet, the flowers and ali bidi, that way you can see the boorn, the trees. Moorditj!

programs.title: Birds Eye View
programs.desc: The birds notice a billboard for a chicken restaurant. Have chickens launched their own branded eatery? When they discover the grim truth they set their minds to vengeance.
